ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "fipstate" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) state code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "fipscty" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) county code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "censtate" INTEGER /* Census state code */,
  "cencty" INTEGER /* Census county code */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., state, county, city) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region data was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fipstate", "fipscty")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "naics" TEXT /* North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) code */,
  "naics_description" TEXT /* Description of the NAICS code */,
  "parent_naics" TEXT /* Parent NAICS code for hierarchical relationships */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Type of the industry (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry data was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_flags" (
  "empflag" TEXT /* Employment flag indicating the type of data (e.g., 250-499 employees) */,
  "empflag_description" TEXT /* Description of the employment flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment flag data was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the employment flag data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("empflag")
)

CREATE TABLE "noise_flags" (
  "noise_flag" TEXT /* Noise flag for employment and payroll data (e.g., 2 to < 5% noise) */,
  "noise_flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the noise flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the noise flag data was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the noise flag data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noise_flag")
)
